examples: I kick off my shoes and run toward the base, eager to beat other tourists who have begun to arrive by the busload.
As we made our way to the gate we passed through a busload of frustrated holiday goers and their screaming children.
Based on the analysis of CAN bus protocol, this paper obtains upper limit of frames in a single CAN bus through calculating its busload.
The first busload brought in included people recruited at a homeless shelter in Texas.
To flesh out the dwindling ranks of the survivors with a busload of new characters?
